class FenwickTree(val size: Int) {
  private val tree = Array.fill(size + 1)(0)
  
  def update(pos: Int, delta: Int): Unit = {
    var i = pos

      i += i & -i

  def query(pos: Int): Int = {

      i -= i & -i
    }
    res

  }
}

class FenwickTree(val size: Int) {
  private val tree = Array.ofDim[Int](size + 1) // 1-based indexing

  def update(index: Int, delta: Int): Unit = {
    var i = index
    while (i <= size) {
      tree(i) += delta
      i += i & -i
    }
  }

  def query(index: Int): Int = {
    var res = 0
    var i = index
    while (i > 0) {
      res += tree(i)
      i -= i & -i
    }
    res
  }

  def rangeQuery(l: Int, r: Int): Int = {
    if (l > r) 0
    else query(r) - query(l - 1)
  }
}
